rationale: Automated review summary; individual actionable comments were classified separately.
Changed the repository metadata response type check to dict for the default_branch extraction.
Made the repository metadata request best-effort so branch pagination still succeeds if metadata lookup fails.
Allowed default branch auto-selection to run when the selected repository changes even if a previous branch is selected.
Added backend regression coverage proving branch options are returned when the metadata endpoint fails.
Automated review wrapper with no separate actionable request beyond the inline comments already addressed.
Added an explicit comment explaining that metadata failures are intentionally ignored so branch discovery can continue without default-branch metadata.
